FUTURE CENTRE FOR TRAINING & PLACEMENT Centre for Training and Placements at Sri Eshwar, provides the finishing touches to the technical and soft skill levels of the students and makes them well polished to enter the job market. The Centre networks, collaborates and brings in the top-most companies across the globe, through their Corporate Relations team. We ensure that the companies visiting Sri Eshwar, have the best hiring experience and take back with them the best students that fit their corporate needs. Sri Eshwar continues to be the preferred campus for hiring, as we consistently produce high quality, industry ready students for the job market. Sri Eshwar is a TOP PLACEMENTS COLLEGE! 60LPA HIGHEST SALARY PACKAGE 120+ HIRING COMPANIES TOP PLACEMENTS COLLEGE ABOVE 10LPA 90 Students LEADERSHIP Mr.Kannan Narasimhan Dean – Industry & International Relations Know more Dr.Arun Jeganathan Associate Director – Placements & Corporate Relations Know more Dr.M.Karthikeyan Associate Director – International & Corporate Relations Know more OUR TOP RECRUITERS SRI ESHWAR - A PREFERRED CAMPUS FOR TOP COMPANIES ​ We have steadily attracted top recruiters across the globe, to our campus. On an average around 200 companies visit our campus for hiring, from young startup companies to top multinational corporate giants. We offer students a wide variety of choices in placements – be it IT product companies; IT service giants; top brands in core manufacturing, electrical, electronics and networking. Here’s a list of some of the companies that visited our campus. IT Product Companies (AI, DS, ML, E-commerce, Cloud, Gaming, Cyber-security, Fintech based companies)​ IT Service Companies ECE/EEE Core Companies Mechanical Core Companies PLACEMENT STATISTICS At Sri Eshwar, each year we outdo the previous year’s placement record with higher package offers, Here’s a list of our esteemed recruiters who have supported us. Every year, more and more companies become a part of the Sri Eshwar hiring experience. Details 2024-2025 2023-2024 2022-2023 2021-2022 No. of Students Opted for Placement 682 523 438 405 No. of Students Placed 637 511 390 392 % of Students Placed 93.40 97.71 89.04 96.79 60 L Highest Package 07 Students Placed Above 0 L 20 Students Placed Above 0 L 100 Students Placed Above 0 L 150+ Students Placed Above 0 L 350+ Students Placed Above 0 L 650+ Students Placed Above 0 L 800+ Students Placed TOP NOTCH PLACEMENT TRAINING PROGRAMS Sri Eshwar has a well-qualified and highly experienced in-house Training and Placement Team and an awesome training infrastructure. This team provides training in various facets of industry-readiness like training in emerging technologies,aptitude and soft skills. Such trainings are introduced to the students from the 1st year so that it becomes naturally inculcated into the DNA of the students. PLACEMENT TRAINING FACILITIES As a top placements college, we pride ourselves in providing exclusive placement training facilities. With more than four 200+ seating capacity facilities, four 60+ seating capacity training rooms, we can accommodate about 1000 students to undergo dedicated hands-on placement training at a time. With such exclusive training facilities paired with industry mentorship and high quality students, Sri Eshwar continues to top in placements every year in Tamil Nadu! INDUSTRY INSTITUTE INTERACTION We, as an institution lay enormous emphasis on Industry-Institute Interaction activities. We put in very effort that is required to provide the industry with highly qualified and skilled fresh engineers.The activities of the Industry Institute Interaction Cell include frequent visit and meeting with the industry representatives, signing of MoUs with companies, establishing and maintaining Centres of excellence, facilitating faculty summer internship with industry, inviting corporate leaders to experience our facilities and interact with our students through our Industry Connect programmes.The MoUs help in maintaining lasting relationships with the companies. We have signed MoUs with leading companies. including Mitsubishi Electric, Virtusa, Aspire Systems, VVDN, to name a few. TRAINING & PLACEMENT TEAM Ms.M.Kalaiselvi , Aptitude Trainer Mr.R.Sakthikumar , Aptitude Trainer Ms.Nithiya Karthik , Softskills Trainer Mr.A.Rajasekar, Aptitude Trainer Mr.L.D. Aloysius Jude , Softskills Trainer Ms.Rubeena M , Aptitude Trainer Ms.J.Jenifer Sofia , Softskills Trainer DEPT PLACEMENT COORDINATORS Mr.S.Sam Peter , Assistant Professor, AIDS Ms.S.Sowmiya , Assistant Professor, AIML Ms.M.Abinaya , Assistant Professor, CSE Mr.M.Mohanraj , Assistant Professor, CSBS Ms.G.G.Sreeja , Assistant Professor, CCE Mr.V.Parthipan , Assistant Professor, ECE Mr.R.Premkumar , Assistant Professor, EEE Mr.U.Prakash , Assistant Professor, IT Mr.A.Vimal , Assistant Professor, Mech CENTRE FOR HIGHER EDUCATION & FOREIGN LANGUAGE The Centre for Higher Education facilitates training and special coaching for students who wish to pursue higher studies: Special On campus coaching classes are conducted for GRE, GATE, CAT, GMAT & TOEFL to help students pursue Master’s degree in India and abroad. Systematic guidance on the various competitive examinations that would help students in getting jobs in public and private sectors, after their B.E degree. Frequent awareness sessions by experts are conducted to update the students on the prospects of pursuing higher education. Japanese and German Language Training is provided to students from first year onward which improves the prospects and proves advantageous to the students with regard to placement and higher studies in foreign countries.
